ignoreCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; cd ../..; BASE=${VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA:-}; HEAD=${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:-HEAD}; if [ -z "${BASE}" ] || [ "${BASE}" = "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then echo "No previous commit SHA available; do not ignore build."; exit 1; fi; git diff --quiet "${BASE}" "${HEAD}" -- apps/web packages/shared'
